// description: Maps each logical Android signing key (the GitHub-secret prefix ANDROID_KEYSTORE_<name>_BASE64 / _PASSWORD / optional _ALIAS) to the .user store folder(s) it materializes into. Each store folder has its own key entry here even when two folders happen to use the same physical key (e.g. Connect google/web) — they are still provided as separate secrets. The key ALIAS is NOT stored here — it is auto-detected from the keystore (or supplied via the optional _ALIAS secret) at materialize time.
